name: Doomed Brigade
short_description: Doomed Brigade is a survival game where you pilot a spaceship, battling hordes of enemies from three different alien races. Level up during each game, unlocking upgrades, modules, and diverse ammunition to equip yourself and crush your foes.
detailed_description:
After a failed space jump, your ship is stranded in the far reaches of the galaxy. Now, you must use all your skills and strategy to survive endless waves of ferocious aliens. Can you adapt your ship and escape before they destroy you?

Doomed Brigade is a survival game where you pilot a spaceship, battling hordes of enemies from three different alien races. Level up during each game, unlocking upgrades, modules, and diverse ammunition to equip yourself and crush your foes.

Features:

  • Auto-shooting

  • Inertia (Don’t ask how it works—we don’t know either).

  • Quick matches of 15 minutes, perfect for fast-paced and exciting sessions.

  • A variety of ships with different sizes and stats to match your playstyle.

  • Customize your ship with unique modules and experiment with an arsenal of ammunition for every combat scenario.
